debug_info.goal:
μ : ℝ
v : NNReal
n : ℕ
h1 : ¬v = 0
h2 : v > 0
f : ℝ → ℝ := fun x => x ^ (2 * n + 1) * √(4 * ↑v - x ^ 2)
⊢ ∀ (x : ℝ), f (-1 * x) = -f x

proof:
intro x
    dsimp [f]
    simp [mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, pow_succ]
failed_attempts:
intro x
    dsimp [f]
    have hpow : ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ (2 * n + 1) = - (x ^ (2 * n + 1)) := by
      simpa [mul_pow, pow_succ, mul_assoc, neg_mul, one_mul] using
        congrArg (fun t : ℝ => t * x ^ (2 * n)) (by simp : (-1 : ℝ) ^ (2 * n + 1) = -1)
    have hsqrt : √(4 * (v : ℝ) - ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ 2) = √(4 * (v : ℝ) - x ^ 2) := by
      simp [mul_pow]
    simp [hpow, hsqrt, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm]

intro x
    dsimp [f]
    have hpow : ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ (2 * n + 1) = - (x ^ (2 * n + 1)) := by
      simp [pow_succ, mul_pow]
    have hsqrt : √(4 * (v : ℝ) - ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ 2) = √(4 * (v : ℝ) - x ^ 2) := by
      simp [mul_pow]
    simp [hpow, hsqrt, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm]

intro x
    dsimp [f]
    have hodd : (-1 : ℝ) ^ (2 * n + 1) = -1 := by
      simp [pow_succ]
    have hsq : ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ 2 = x ^ 2 := by ring
    calc
      ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ (2 * n + 1) * √(4 * (v : ℝ) - ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ 2)
          = ((-1 : ℝ) ^ (2 * n + 1) * x ^ (2 * n + 1)) * √(4 * (v : ℝ) - x ^ 2) := by
              simp [mul_pow, hsq, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm]
      _ = (-1 * x ^ (2 * n + 1)) * √(4 * (v : ℝ) - x ^ 2) := by simp [hodd]
      _ = -(x ^ (2 * n + 1) * √(4 * (v : ℝ) - x ^ 2)) := by ring

intro x
    dsimp [f]
    have hpow : ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ (2 * n + 1) = - (x ^ (2 * n + 1)) := by
      simpa [mul_pow, pow_succ] using (by ring : ((-1 : ℝ) ^ (2 * n + 1)) * x ^ (2 * n + 1) = -x ^ (2 * n + 1))
    have hsqrt : √(4 * (v : ℝ) - ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ 2) = √(4 * (v : ℝ) - x ^ 2) := by
      simp [mul_pow, pow_two]
    simp [hpow, hsqrt, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm]

intro x
    dsimp [f]
    simp [mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm]

intro x
    dsimp [f]
    have hpow : ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ (2 * n + 1) = - (x ^ (2 * n + 1)) := by
      simp [mul_pow, pow_succ]
    have hsqrt : √(4 * (v : ℝ) - ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ 2) = √(4 * (v : ℝ) - x ^ 2) := by
      simp [mul_pow]
    simp [hpow, hsqrt, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, neg_mul]

intro x
    dsimp [f]
    simp [mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, pow_add, pow_mul]

intro x
    dsimp [f]
    have hx : ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ 2 = x ^ 2 := by
      simp [pow_two, mul_assoc]
    simp [mul_pow, pow_mul, hx, neg_mul]

intro x
    dsimp [f]
    have hx : ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ (2 * n + 1) = - (x ^ (2 * n + 1)) := by
      simp [pow_succ, pow_mul]
    have hs : √(4 * (v : ℝ) - ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ 2) = √(4 * (v : ℝ) - x ^ 2) := by
      simp [pow_two, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm]
    simp [hx, hs, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm]

intro x
    dsimp [f]
    have hxpow : ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ (2 * n + 1) = - (x ^ (2 * n + 1)) := by
      simpa [mul_pow, pow_succ] using (neg_pow (x := x) (n := 2 * n + 1))
    have hxsq : ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ 2 = x ^ 2 := by
      simp [mul_pow]
    simp [hxpow, hxsq, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm]

intro x
    dsimp [f]
    have hx : ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ 2 = x ^ 2 := by
      simp [pow_two, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm]
    have hx' : ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ (2 * n + 1) = - x ^ (2 * n + 1) := by
      simpa using (neg_pow_bit1 x n)
    simp [hx', hx, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm]

intro x
    dsimp [f]
    have hxodd : ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ (2 * n + 1) = - (x ^ (2 * n + 1)) := by
      simp [mul_pow, pow_succ]
    have hxsq : (4 * (v : ℝ) - ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ 2) = (4 * (v : ℝ) - x ^ 2) := by
      simp [mul_pow]
    simp [hxodd, hxsq, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm]

intro x
    dsimp [f]
    have hx : ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ 2 = x ^ 2 := by
      simp [pow_two, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm]
    simp [pow_add, pow_mul, hx, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm]

intro x
    dsimp [f]
    have hx : ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ 2 = x ^ 2 := by
      simp [pow_two, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm]
    have hsqrt : √(4 * (v : ℝ) - ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ 2) = √(4 * (v : ℝ) - x ^ 2) := by
      simp [hx]
    have hpow : ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ (2 * n + 1) = - x ^ (2 * n + 1) := by
      simpa using (neg_pow_bit1 x n)
    simp [hsqrt, hpow, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm]

intro x
    dsimp [f]
    have hpow : ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ (2 * n + 1) = - (x ^ (2 * n + 1)) := by
      simpa [mul_pow, neg_one_pow_eq_or, pow_succ] using
        (by
          have : ((-1 : ℝ) ^ (2 * n + 1)) = (-1 : ℝ) := by
            simpa using (neg_one_pow (2 * n + 1))
          calc
            ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ (2 * n + 1)
                = (-1 : ℝ) ^ (2 * n + 1) * x ^ (2 * n + 1) := by
                    simp [mul_pow]
            _ = (-1 : ℝ) * x ^ (2 * n + 1) := by simpa [this]
            _ = - (x ^ (2 * n + 1)) := by simp)
    have hsqrt : √(4 * (v : ℝ) - ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ 2) = √(4 * (v : ℝ) - x ^ 2) := by
      simp [mul_pow, pow_two]
    simp [hpow, hsqrt, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm]

intro x
    dsimp [f]
    have hpow : ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ (2 * n + 1) = - (x ^ (2 * n + 1)) := by
      simpa [mul_pow] using (neg_one_mul x) ▸ (neg_pow (x := x) (n := 2 * n + 1))
    have hsqrt : √(4 * (v : ℝ) - ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ 2) = √(4 * (v : ℝ) - x ^ 2) := by
      simp [mul_pow]
    simp [hpow, hsqrt, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm]

intro x
    dsimp [f]
    simp [mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, pow_add, pow_mul]

intro x
    dsimp [f]
    have hxpow : ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ (2 * n + 1) = - (x ^ (2 * n + 1)) := by
      simp [pow_succ]
    have hxsqrt : √(4 * (v : ℝ) - ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ 2) = √(4 * (v : ℝ) - x ^ 2) := by
      simp [pow_two]
    simp [hxpow, hxsqrt, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, neg_mul]

intro x
    dsimp [f]
    have hpow : ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ (2 * n + 1) = - x ^ (2 * n + 1) := by
      simpa [mul_pow] using (neg_pow (x := x) (n := 2 * n + 1))
    have hsqrt : √(4 * (v : ℝ) - ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ 2) = √(4 * (v : ℝ) - x ^ 2) := by
      simp [mul_pow]
    simp [hpow, hsqrt, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm]

intro x
    dsimp [f]
    have hx : ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ 2 = x ^ 2 := by
      simp [pow_two, mul_assoc]
    rw [pow_mul, pow_succ, pow_mul, pow_succ]
    simp [hx, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm]

intro x
    dsimp [f]
    have hx : ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ (2 * n + 1) = - (x ^ (2 * n + 1)) := by
      simp [mul_pow]
    have hs : √(4 * (v : ℝ) - ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ 2) = √(4 * (v : ℝ) - x ^ 2) := by
      simp [mul_pow]
    simp [hx, hs, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm]

intro x
    dsimp [f]
    have hx : ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ (2 * n + 1) = - x ^ (2 * n + 1) := by
      simp [mul_pow]
    have hs : √(4 * (v : ℝ) - ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ 2) = √(4 * (v : ℝ) - x ^ 2) := by
      simp [mul_pow]
    simp [hx, hs, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm]

intro x
    dsimp [f]
    have hxodd : ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ (2 * n + 1) = - x ^ (2 * n + 1) := by
      simp [mul_pow, pow_succ]
    have hxsq : ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ 2 = x ^ 2 := by
      simp [mul_pow]
    simp [hxodd, hxsq, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm]

intro x
    dsimp [f]
    have hx : ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ 2 = x ^ 2 := by
      simp [pow_two, mul_assoc]
    simp [mul_pow, odd_add, hx, pow_succ]

intro x
    dsimp [f]
    have hpow : ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ (2 * n + 1) = - (x ^ (2 * n + 1)) := by
      simpa [mul_assoc, pow_succ] using (neg_one_mul x) ▸ (neg_pow (x := x) (n := 2 * n + 1))
    have hsqrt : √(4 * (v : ℝ) - ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ 2) = √(4 * (v : ℝ) - x ^ 2) := by
      simp [pow_two, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm]

successful_attempts:
intro x
    dsimp [f]
    simp [mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, pow_succ]

intro x
    dsimp [f]
    have hx : ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ 2 = x ^ 2 := by
      simp [pow_two, mul_assoc]
    simp [mul_pow, hx, pow_add, pow_mul]

intro x
    dsimp [f]
    have hx : (-1 : ℝ) * x = -x := by ring
    simp [hx, pow_succ, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm]

intro x
    dsimp [f]
    have hx : ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ 2 = x ^ 2 := by
      simp [pow_two, mul_assoc]
    simp [mul_pow, hx, pow_succ]

intro x
    dsimp [f]
    have hx : ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ 2 = x ^ 2 := by
      simp [pow_two, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm]
    simp [mul_pow, hx, pow_succ]

intro x
    dsimp [f]
    simp [mul_assoc, pow_succ, pow_mul]

intro x
    dsimp [f]
    have hxpow : ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ (2 * n + 1) = - x ^ (2 * n + 1) := by
      simp [pow_succ, mul_pow]
    have hxsq : ((-1 : ℝ) * x) ^ 2 = x ^ 2 := by
      simp [mul_pow]
    rw [hxpow, hxsq]
    ring
